Platters & Boards.name: Cheese and Crackers

Platters & Boards.name: Hummus
Platters & Boards.desc:
Roasted garlic hummus, red pepper hummus, lemon fennel, and sun-dried tomato
basil hummus. Served with tortilla chips, pita chips, crostini, and fresh baby carrots, celery, and peppers.

Platters & Boards.name: Shrimp Cocktail
Platters & Boards.desc:
Cooked shrimp served with fresh lemon wedges and spicy cocktail sauce
on top of a bed of shaved ice garnished with sprigs of parsley.

Cheeses: Sharp cheddar, gouda, and brie

Accompaniments: Crackers, mixed nuts, and olives

Platters & Boards.name:
Charcuterie Board:
Vegetarian Board

Extras: Grapes and apple slices

Platters & Boards.name: Tabletop Hot Appetizer Platter

Bar/Beverage.name: Open Bar: Beer & Wine
Bar/Beverage.desc:
$22 per person. Includes beer, red & white wine, red/white sangria, and soft drinks.  If desired to do just 1 hr open bar, 1st hour open bar will be  $11
Extra Hour for beer & wine would be: $7

Bar/Beverage.name:
Open Bar: Beer & Wine 
w/ 3 Signature Drinks
Bar/Beverage.desc:
$27 per person. Includes 3 specialty drinks, beer, red & white wine, red/white sangria, and soft drinks.  If desired to do just 1 hr open bar, 1st hour open bar will be  $12
Extra Hour would be full bar + 3 sig. drinks would be: $8

Bar/Beverage.name: Open Bar: Full Bar
Bar/Beverage.desc:
$30 per person. beer, red & white wine, red/white sangria, liquor, and soft drinks. If desired to do just 1 hr open bar, 1st hour open bar will be  $16
Add top shelf option: $4 - $8 per person.
Extra Hour would be for full bar would be: $8

Bar/Beverage.name: Open Bar: Full Bar + 2 Signature Drinks
Bar/Beverage.desc:
$35 per person. beer, red & white wine, red/white sangria, liquor, 2 signature drinks, and soft drinks.  If desired to do just 1 hr open bar, 1st hour open bar will be  $19
Add top shelf option: $4 - $8 per person.
Extra Hour would be for full bar + 2 sig. drinks would be: $9
